employee home addresses are not collected

must_detect.matched_text:
MNPI control: deal room materials concerning the proposed Rivermere Exchange secondary listing are excluded and redactions were completed on 20 May 2026; sample checks confirmed zero MNPI present.
Lawful basis: compliance with obligations under UK MAR and Thornhaven’s legitimate interests in market-abuse detection; the vendor will not perform automated decision-making with legal or similarly significant effects.
Supplier Onboarding Form FIN-SUP-09 and DPA Schedule 2 (Processor Instructions) are annexed, limiting processing to calibration and prohibiting profiling outside the documented purposes.
Transfer mechanism: the UK IDTA with CloudHarbor was signed on 18 May 2026, and a transfer risk assessment was approved by Ms. Priya Delmere (DPO) on 19 May 2026; encryption in transit and at rest has been verified.
